title: Vlcc Dirty Tonne Days
summary:
Main
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 10, 6 March, 2025
Sluggish VLCC Growth Amid Geopolitical Uncertainty
The VLCC dirty tonne-days segment has experienced a significant decline since the beginning of 2025, marking one of the weakest growth phases in recent years. As shown in the left chart, 2025's trajectory (blue line) is well below 2023 and 2024 levels, with tonne-days consistently trending downward. This decline aligns with the evolving energy landscape, particularly in response to recent Trump administration decisions, which have reshaped global crude oil trade patterns.
